steps.t: The goblins of the Ram Dúath have stolen several treasures from the Suuri-lehmä. Aslak has told you that the gems might be found in chests within the …
You have recovered several semi-precious gems stolen from the Surri-lehmä by the goblins of the Ram Duath. You must return them to Aslak at Lehmä-koti…
